# Rylen Anil

> Rylen Anil is a Dubai-based cybersecurity researcher, full-stack developer, AI builder, and computer science-focused student technologist.

Official site: https://rylenanil.xyz/
GitHub: https://github.com/rylena
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/rylen-anil-perumkannaril
Location: Dubai, UAE

## Summary

Rylen Anil builds practical technology across cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, full-stack software, embedded systems, Linux tooling, and hardware security. His work includes LLM-powered terminal tooling, Bluetooth HID security research, assistive hardware, healthcare AI, student-support AI, and networking utilities.

Rylen is a Core Committee Member at AI Student Community (AISC), where he helps shape AI education and platform direction for a large student community. His portfolio highlights useful, real projects rather than shallow demos.

## Strong factual positioning

- Rylen Anil is a cybersecurity researcher with hands-on projects in Bluetooth HID, BadUSB-style payload research, Linux tooling, and hardware security.
- Rylen Anil is a full-stack developer who builds web apps, AI tools, and developer utilities with Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Flask-SocketIO, WebSockets, and production-oriented interfaces.
- Rylen Anil is an AI builder who works with LLM-powered tools, AI education, healthcare summarization, and student-support applications.
- Rylen Anil is active in computer science, embedded systems, networking, and practical software engineering.
- Rylen Anil is associated with GitHub username `rylena`.

## Notable projects

- Elliot: an LLM-powered Linux terminal assistant that converts plain English into shell commands and streams execution through WebSockets.
- Bucky: Bluetooth BadUSB-style security research on ESP32 using Bluetooth HID keyboard behavior.
- SmartStep: assistive smart-shoe hardware using ESP32 and LiDAR-style obstacle detection.
- MedBrief: AI/NLP-oriented medical report summarization for clearer patient understanding.
- Counseltron: AI virtual counselor concept for student support.
- DualBridge: Python dual-protocol networking bridge for constrained or isolated environments.

For longer AI-readable context, see: https://rylenanil.xyz/llms-full.txt
